name: Lumen Drift
tagline: An original Game Boy Advance game — finished, publish-safe, 100% original assets.
description: A finished homebrew GBA ROM (v1.3) built entirely from original assets. Play it by loading the ROM into any GBA emulator once the download release is published.
status_note: Download release pending: the GitHub Release (lumen-drift-v1.3) needs one owner click before the ROM can be offered here.

blocker.owner_action: Publish the GitHub Release lumen-drift-v1.3 in menno420/gba-homebrew — one owner click on the release page.
blocker.unblocks: The published release gives the ROM a public download URL; once that URL is recorded in this registry, the card gains a real Download button.

name: mineverse
tagline: A staged web mining-world game — the fleet's games flagship.
description: A staged web game with stages 0, a, b and c complete. It now serves live as a read-only view over the superbot mining economy; player sign-in is launching next.

name: games-web
tagline: A zero-dependency web app: an RPG mining character sheet in the browser.
description: A zero-dependency web app showing an RPG mining character sheet. The GitHub Pages deploy workflow exists, but the site is not reachable yet — its documented URL currently returns 404.
status_note: GitHub Pages deployment pending an owner settings click (Settings → Pages → Source: GitHub Actions); no reachable URL until then.

blocker.owner_action: In menno420/product-forge, set Settings → Pages → Source to GitHub Actions — one owner settings click.
blocker.unblocks: The existing deploy workflow can then publish the site; once its URL is reachable, this registry records it and the card links out.
